creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Michael Dexter from comment #5)

Hi Michael,

Please read my comment again.  I told you to *remove* -v from your invocation, not to add it.  It is already there, right in the middle.

mkisofs \
     -b boot/etfsboot.com -no-emul-boot -c BOOT.CAT \
     -iso-level 4 -J -l -D \
     -N -joliet-long \
     -relaxed-filenames ***-v*** \
     -V "Custom" -udf \
     -boot-info-table -eltorito-alt-boot -eltorito-platform 0xEF \
     -eltorito-boot efi/microsoft/boot/efisys_noprompt.bin \
     -no-emul-boot \
     -o install.iso iso-remaster

If you add another -v, the output will of course become even more verbose.  Remove -v and add -quiet instead.
